scripts.skills:verify: pnpm runtime-core:build && node --input-type=module -e "import { composeRunPrompts, resolveChatOrchestration, verifyChatCatalog } from './packages/runtime-core/dist/index.js'; const o=resolveChatOrchestration({mode:'deep'}); const cat=verifyChatCatalog(); if(!cat.ok) throw new Error('catalog missing: '+cat.missingSlugs.join(',')); const r=composeRunPrompts({mode:'deep',userText:'test',processSkill:o.baseProcessSkill,platformNormSkill:o.platformNormSkill,chatCatalog:o.catalog}); if(!r.systemPrompt.includes('<available_skills>')) throw new Error('catalog not in system'); if(r.meta.orchestrationMode!=='hybrid-steer') throw new Error('orchestrationMode'); if(r.meta.injectedSlugs.length!==2) throw new Error('expected 2 injected slugs, got '+r.meta.injectedSlugs.length); console.log('ok', r.meta.catalogSlugs?.length, 'slugs', r.systemPrompt.length);"
scripts.mvp:verify: pnpm skills:verify && pnpm smoke:companion:codex && pnpm smoke:companion:claude && node scripts/smoke-companion-any.mjs
scripts.skills:verify-ppt: pnpm skills:sync-ppt && pnpm runtime-core:build && node --input-type=module -e "import { loadSkill, loadSkillBundle } from './packages/runtime-core/dist/index.js'; const b=loadSkillBundle({processSkill:'skill-ppt-pitch-deck',platformNormSkill:'skill-platform-research-norms'}); if(b.missing.length) throw new Error('missing: '+b.missing.join(',')); const deck=loadSkill('skill-ppt-deck'); const html=loadSkill('skill-ppt-html-studio'); if(!deck||!html) throw new Error('ppt skills not on disk'); console.log('ok ppt', b.process?.slug, 'refs', b.process?.referencePaths.length, 'html-studio', html.referencePaths.length);"
scripts.desktop:pack: pnpm desktop:icons && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter @jlc/desktop pack
scripts.desktop:pack:dir: pnpm desktop:icons && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter @jlc/desktop pack:dir
